notes: Performace was bad. The game was playible, but ther frame rate was consistantly below 20 FPS. The only config this game has over graphics is a few presets on the menu that opens when it launches, and the game only became playible on "Very Low" settings, still with noticible stuttering.

notes: Game starts but crashes after input from an xbox controller. And by "crashes" I mean  it completely shuts down my computer...
title: Garfield Kart

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Any attempt to play at a high resolution results in painfully low (sub-10) FPS, and the controller mappings I found did not seem to work. Steam controller users beware, the 10-vote community mapping is a dupe - all/most buttons are mapped to "Shutdown computer". If I ever get one that works, I may upload my own.
title: Garfield Kart

notes:
Works perfectly out of the box, but I am using the multiplayer beta, which normally increases perfomance on Windows as well. Runs at 60fps on 1080p fullscreen. Haven't tested multiplayer, but it should work. Also haven't tried the regular non-beta version, but if the beta patch increases performance on Windows and adds multiplayer, then there isn't any point to playing the normal version. 

To enable the beta, just go to the properties of Garfield Kart, select the "Betas" tab and select the "multi_test" beta. When launching the game, the bottom option to "Play Garfield Kart" should usually be the MP version.
title: Garfield Kart
